title: The Death of Robin Hood Rotten Tomatoes score (>=68%)?

adversarial_concerns: Reliance on small sample size (22 reviews) to predict final score
Assumption that divisive films 'stabilize' at low-to-mid 60s lacks empirical grounding
Failure to account for potential upward drift in scores as more critics review the film
current.rationale_summary: At 64% on 22 reviews, 4pts below the 68 line, divisive reception, ~3 days to resolve. Early scores drift roughly symmetrically with no upward bias; divisive films stabilize/sag as broader pool lands, so modal stays low-to-mid 60s, short of 68. ~0.32.
